reviews.review_text: The car had an undisclosed minor dent and prior accident history that I wasn't told about.
revealed_facts: Quarter-sized dent with minor paint crack on rear passenger door from shopping cart impact, partially hidden by door handle shadow in photos
Single Carfax flag for minor fender bender in 2021, repaired at non-certified body shop with aftermarket bumper cover

reviews.review_text: The seller said it was 'one-owner' but it was a rental car, and they didn't mention the transmission issues or oil consumption, which made me feel quite misled.
revealed_facts: CVT exhibits shuddering and hesitation during acceleration between 25-40 mph, early signs of belt wear typical of Nissan Jatco units at this mileage
Vehicle was used as a rental fleet car for Enterprise for first 38 months of service, higher wear pattern than typical private ownership
Slight oil seep visible at valve cover gasket, consumes approximately 1 quart every 2500 miles

reviews.review_text: The seller actively misrepresented the car's condition, hiding major issues with the engine, transmission, and significant rust, and the odometer was rolled back.
revealed_facts: Odometer was rolled back from 187,000 to 142,000 miles; prior auction records confirm actual mileage
8-speed automatic exhibits shudder between 35-50 mph indicating torque converter lockup clutch failure; repair typically $2,800-$3,500
Active Fuel Management lifters ticking on cold start with intermittent misfire codes on cylinders 1 and 7; lifter/cam replacement needed
Rear frame crossmember shows significant corrosion with 30% material loss; will fail inspection in rust-belt states

reviews.review_text: The car drives wonderfully and the seller was friendly, though a tiny bit more detail on minor interior wear would have been nice.
revealed_facts: Driver seat bolster has minor wear and slight fabric pilling from entry/exit

reviews.review_text: The seller did not disclose a significant front-end collision and an active engine oil leak, despite claiming transparency and meticulous maintenance.
revealed_facts: Moderate front-end collision in 2019 with $7,200 in repairs through insurance; airbags did not deploy but bumper, hood, and radiator support were replaced
Valve cover gasket seeping oil onto exhaust manifold, causing occasional burning smell after spirited driving; repair quoted at $850
Driver seat bolster leather cracked and foam showing through; passenger side beginning to crack as well

reviews.review_text: The seller misrepresented the car's maintenance history, claiming it was 'meticulously cared for' when an oil change was significantly overdue.
revealed_facts: Quarter-panel dent on rear passenger side approximately 3 inches in diameter, touched up but visible under direct light
Oil change overdue by 4,200 miles; last documented service at 68,500 miles
